currentFocus: Post-launch hotfixes for production controls, feedback delivery, and release trust
strapline: A stable 1.0 line with tight hotfix discipline, clear release identity, and trustworthy player-facing recovery paths.

timeline.title: Foundation
timeline.summary: Browser build, local harness, release identity, and public deployment are in place.

timeline.title: Reference Baseline
timeline.summary: Manuals, footage, and challenge-stage reference notes now drive fidelity decisions.

timeline.title: Stage 1 Feel
timeline.summary: Opening pacing and descent timing are much closer to original Galaga.

timeline.title: Stage 2 Opening
timeline.summary: The cramped opening was reduced by softening early attack pressure instead of moving the formation.

timeline.title: Stage 3 Challenge
timeline.summary: The current launch slice uses an acceptable challenge-stage baseline, with broader variation and fidelity work intentionally deferred unless a fresh regression appears.

timeline.title: Stage 4 Fairness
timeline.summary: The launch path now treats further Stage 4 retuning as a post-1.0 tuning pass unless a fresh regression makes it launch-critical again.

timeline.title: Capture / Rescue
timeline.summary: Core loop works, dual-fighter rescue is now testable end-to-end, and carrying-boss readability is better, but the natural rescue flow still needs one more confidence pass.

timeline.title: Special Squadron Bonus
timeline.summary: Manual-backed bonus logic exists, the attack now appears naturally in real play, and escort spacing was tightened, but the bonus moment still needs one more live-play polish pass for 1.0.

timeline.title: Ship-Ready Polish
timeline.summary: Native replay, player guide, icon-rail controls, wait-mode polish, release notes, and production publish correctness are the current prelaunch finish work.

timeline.title: 1.0 Release
timeline.summary: Republish production from the current beta candidate once the environment split and final release-readiness pass are confirmed.

legend.label: Foundation
legend.detail: Build, deploy, automation, and reference infrastructure.

legend.label: Four-Stage Slice
legend.detail: Stages 1, 2, 3 challenge, and 4 as the current shippable game.

legend.label: Fair Finish
legend.detail: The launch slice is currently considered healthy enough to ship; further Stage 2 and Stage 4 tuning is now a post-1.0 lane unless new regressions surface.

legend.label: Arcade Moments
legend.detail: Capture/rescue and special squadron bonus moments should read clearly in normal play, not only in harness scenarios.

legend.label: Player Finish
legend.detail: High scores, replays, guide/help, results flow, and public pages should feel finished and trustworthy.
